channel.title: Chris Moyles Radio X Show Replay
channel.description: A replay of the Chris Moyles Radio X Show. The music has been removed from the recording for compliance reasons.
channel.itunes:summary: A replay of the Chris Moyles Radio X Show. The music has been removed from the recording for compliance reasons.
channel.itunes:author: chrismoyles.net

image.title: Chris Moyles Radio X Show Replay

item.title: Saturday, 11th April 2026 - Chris Moyles Radio X Replay
item.description: A replay of the Chris Moyles Radio X Show from Saturday, 11th April 2026. Saturday Show. Thanks to neilt0 for the capture and to ianpwilliams for editing.
item.itunes:subtitle: Historical Chris Moyles Radio X Shows without the music!
item.itunes:summary: A replay of the Chris Moyles Radio X Show from Saturday, 11th April 2026. Saturday Show. Thanks to neilt0 for the capture and to ianpwilliams for editing.
item.itunes:author: chrismoyles.net

item.itunes:subtitle: Historical Chris Moyles Radio X Shows without the music!
item.itunes:summary: A replay of the Chris Moyles Radio X Show from Friday, 10th April 2026. Includes edited podcast. Thanks to neilt0 for the capture and to ianpwilliams for editing.
